{{Quote|Like our damaged galaxy, the new Jedi order will require generations to define itself. Some of us have already committed to the roles we will play in that process. [...] Kirana Ti, Damaya, and Streen have much work to do on Dathomir.|[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]|<ref name="TUF" />}}
'''Damaya''' was a [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomiri]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who was one of the [[Witches of Dathomir|witches]] of the [[Singing Mountain Clan]]. She was the niece of [[Baritha]]. Damaya fought against [[Gethzerion]] and her [[Nightsisters/Legends|Nightsisters]] during the [[Battle of Dathomir (Hunt for Zsinj)|Battle of the Singing Mountain]] in [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]].<ref name="TCoPL" /> Sometime after that conflict, she joined the [[New Jedi Order]].<ref name="TUF" /> During the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], she fought alongside [[Kirana Ti]] to [[Invasion of Dathomir (Yuuzhan Vong War)|protect]] Dathomir and her people from the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] invaders.<ref name="TCSWE">{{CSWECite|I|163|Damaya}}</ref> After the war, Damaya, Kirana Ti, and [[Streen]] did a great deal of work<ref name="TUF" /> to establish a [[Jedi Praxeum (Dathomir)|Jedi academy]] on Dathomir.<ref name="TCSWE2">{{CSWECite|III|194|Streen}}</ref>

==Appearances==
